insertion_point: the interface following baseline feature encoding
host_input_semantics: baseline features and ordered action values
host_output_semantics: refined values with the same action order
semantic_mapping: source and host share action identifiers and value order
predicted_effect: improve task success in shifted scenarios
input_shape: batch x feature_dim plus batch x action_vocabulary
normalization: use frozen encoder statistics and temperature-calibrated uncertainty
masks: respect the semantic action mask before residual action selection
ordering: preserve the baseline action ontology order
assumptions: uncertainty calibration uses only the training split
gradient_expectation: gradients update the residual and calibration heads but do not enter the frozen baseline encoder
parameter_update_scope: residual policy and uncertainty calibration parameters only
loss_scale: residual loss weight 1.0 and calibration loss weight 0.1
baseline_parity_behavior: disabling enable_uncertainty_residual returns the unchanged frozen baseline action values
